reason: Browser-use feature successfully opened a real browser, navigated to example.com, and retrieved the page title
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the SuperAgent homepage with agent list visible
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260526-200049-7pyz" agent in the agent list — Successfully opened the agent's chat interface
Step 3: Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field — Message successfully entered and visible in input field
Step 4: Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and tool calls began executing
Step 5: Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Response received in 12 seconds with the text "The page title is "Example Domain"." confirming successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
